results.title: Figure skating-Olympic champion Kulik's coach Kudriavtsev dies aged 88
results.description: June 22 (Reuters) - ⁠Viktor Kudriavtsev, who coached Ilya ⁠Kulik to the men's ‌gold medal at the 1998 Nagano Olympics, has died at the age of ​88, the Russian Figure ⁠Skating Federation ⁠said on Monday.
